allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ar -Recurse -Filter *.html | Select-String 'Gold Trading System' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Filename | Sort-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 10")

Bash(node --eval "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('ar/insights/index.html','utf8'\);const visible=html.replace\(/<script[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/gi,' '\).replace\(/<style[\\s\\S]*?<\\/style>/gi,' '\).replace\(/<[^>]+>/g,' '\).replace\(/\\s+/g,' '\);const bad=['market education','provider architecture','research candidates'];bad.forEach\(b=>{if\(new RegExp\(b,'i'\).test\(visible\)\)console.log\('FOUND:',b\);}\);")

Bash(node --eval "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('ar/insights/index.html','utf8'\);const visible=html.replace\(/<script[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/gi,' '\).replace\(/<style[\\s\\S]*?<\\/style>/gi,' '\).replace\(/<[^>]+>/g,' '\).replace\(/\\s+/g,' '\);const pats=['watchlist candidates','ranking recommendation','provide price targets','predict future performance','market education','future generated','provider architecture','long-term ownership costs','A fast educational','does the analyzer','Can I use this','Will real market data','high-CTR','buy or sell recommendations','analyst-style explanations','Investors follow','revenue durability','competitive positioning','sector leadership','research candidates','Most followed','Market candidates','Top الأسهم','screening'];pats.forEach\(p=>{if\(new RegExp\(p,'i'\).test\(visible\)\)console.log\('FOUND:',p,visible.match\(new RegExp\('.{0,30}'+p+'.{0,30}','i'\)\)[0]\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('data/research-assets/index.json','utf8'\)\); const stocks=d.stocks||[]; const want=['AAPL','MSFT','NVDA','AMZN','GOOGL','META','TSLA','AVGO','ORCL','NFLX','JPM','XOM','LLY','UNH','COST','V','MA','BRK.B']; want.forEach\(s=>{ const found=stocks.find\(x=>x.symbol===s\); console.log\(s,':', found?'FOUND':'MISSING'\); }\);")
